subject: Congratulations! You've Won £850,000.00 in the 2026 International Email Lottery
body:
CONGRATULATIONS!!!

We are pleased to inform you that your email address was selected in our annual International Email Lottery draw held on March 15, 2026. You have been awarded the sum of £850,000.00 (Eight Hundred and Fifty Thousand British Pounds).

Your winning details:
- Ticket Number: IPB-56290-UK
- Reference Number: BTL/491/02/UK
- Batch: 24/00918/IPD

To claim your prize, please contact our Claims Processing Agent within 7 days:

Dr. Richard Thompson
Claims Director
Email: claims@international-promotions-board.com
Phone: +44-702-409-3281

You will need to provide the following for verification:
1. Full legal name
2. Date of birth
3. Home address
4. Phone number
5. Copy of passport or government-issued ID
6. Processing fee of £750 (refundable upon prize disbursement)

This lottery is sponsored by Microsoft, Google, and the European Union Commission as part of our social responsibility initiative.

Do not share this notification with anyone to avoid double claims and disqualification.

Congratulations once again!

Sincerely,
Sir Alan Pemberton
International Online Promotions Board
London, United Kingdom
